title: Fix Registration Flow: Details Form → Internet Identity Step

requirements.text: Fix the multi-step registration flow on RegisterPage so that: Step 1 collects Name, Phone Number, and BGMI Player ID; after the user submits Step 1, Step 2 renders the Internet Identity login/authentication button so the user can complete registration via Internet Identity. The Internet Identity step must be clearly visible and functional after Step 1 form submission.

quotes: Pehle user name/phone/BGMI ID bhare, phir Internet Identity se login kare
user me rgister karne ke time name , phone no. ,bgmi id ye sab mang raha lekin esake baad Internet Identity option nhi aa raha h

acceptanceCriteria: Step 1 of registration shows Name, Phone Number, and BGMI Player ID fields
After submitting Step 1, the page transitions to Step 2 which displays the Internet Identity login button
Internet Identity button is fully visible and clickable in Step 2
After successful Internet Identity authentication, the player is registered and redirected to the player dashboard
The step indicator clearly shows progress (Step 1 → Step 2 → Success)

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Do not change the backend registration logic or data model
Preserve existing styling and brand theme of the RegisterPage
nonGoals: Adding OTP or SMS phone number verification
Changing the login flow for existing users (LoginPage)
Adding new fields to the registration form
Implementing coin wallet or payment proof system
